commitResults.messageBody:
The current EditCommand uses setPerson, which can be confusing. SetPerson should set the selected person in the model, not edit them.

The setPerson would then be used by ViewCommand.

commitResults.messageTitle: Add view command to display details of a selected person
commitResults.messageBody:
To encapsulate which person is being viewed and displayed,
we add an Optional<Person> to represent this.

Let's:
* Update the model to represent the person being viewed
* Add logic for the setting of this viewed person
* Add parser and relevant logic for ViewCommand

commitResults.messageTitle: Update ViewCommand to display correct index and refine person selection logic
Cosmetic fixes to ViewCommand and other classes

commitResults.messageBody: This is necessary to use the icons in the UI.

commitResults.messageTitle: Add isolated UI components for directory and dashboard tabs
commitResults.messageBody: Let's create components, tabs, and FXML files for our mockup.

commitResults.messageTitle: Bug: Fix UI screen window position & size issue
commitResults.messageBody:
In the previous implementation, the UI screen window position was not
being saved and restored correctly.

If the window were in a monitor, and we were to unplug the monitor, the
window would save the non-existent positions for next iterations.

This commit fixes the issue by ensuring that the window position is only
saved when the window is in a valid position,

Furthermore, the default window size is now set to fullscreen for
better user experience.

commitResults.messageTitle: Add additional UI components and refactor existing UI components into a separate package

commitResults.messageBody:
UI updates:
* UI Component Additions:
   * Added new panels and tabs: FilterPanel, DashboardTab, DirectoryTab, SettingsTab, CcaRecordsPanel, and DemeritRecordsPanel, each with their own FXML files and placeholder data for demonstration.
   * Increased default window size in GuiSettings and modified window initialization logic to maximize the window and validate saved coordinates against active screens, preventing off-screen launches.

* Styling Updates:
   * Brand scheme colors: primary-yellow, primary-blue, primary-dark-grey, primary-medium-grey, primary-light-grey

* Window Initialization and Sizing:
   * Fix a window position initialization bug
   * Make app fullscreen

In order to quickly locate FXML files given its Java wrapper and vice
versa, let's mirror the directory structure of ui/ in
resources/view.

To support the UI showing the details of a selected person (and future
editing through GUI), we need an Observable Person to be encapsulated
in the model, and logic to retrive and set it when needed.

We also need to consider the case where the app is newly initialized or
when all persons are cleared, in which case the selected person should
not exist.

Hence, selectedPerson is a SimpleObjectProperty<Optional<Person>>, with
appropriate getter and setter method in the model and logic interface.

commitResults.messageTitle: Switch tab to directory upon view command
commitResults.messageBody:
It is more intuitive to switch the tab to the directory tab when the
user executes the view command.

commitResults.messageTitle: Formatting changes to pass CI tests
Add view command and integrate with Logic and UI
commitResults.messageBody:
View command allows users to display details of a selected 
person from the CLI and GUI.

Let's:
* Add ViewCommand and related parsers to create new entries.
* Encapsulate the selectedPerson property to control access/
updates from the UI and logic.
* Fix potential bugs in the view command and UI interactions.
* Improve folder structures of UI components.
